news.t: Principal Asset Management® Launches Fixed Income ETF Suite

overview.description: The Principal Inflation Protection ETF (RIZE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US TIPS during periods of rising US inflation. The fund targets effective portfolio duration of zero to five years. RIZE was launched on May 21, 2026 and is issued by Principal.

data.title: Principal Asset Management® Launches Fixed Income ETF Suite
data.text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Asset Management® today announced the launch of Principal® Fit, a fixed income exchange-traded fund (ETF) suite that includes four newly launched exchange-...
